title: dryopteris oligophylla
intro: Dryopteris oligophylla, also known as the dwarf wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris oligophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
